commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 13. "I have been forgotten, as one dead from the heart" (ver. 12). And they have forgotten me, as if I were dead from their hearts. "I have become as a lost vessel." I have seemed to myself to be lost to all the Lord's service, living in this world, and gaining none, when all were afraid to join themselves unto me.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Heart, past recovery. Protestants, "dead man out of mind. "(Haydock)
Vessel means, "any thing. "(Calmet)
A broken pot is thrown away. (Menochius)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
